The question is asking to determine the number of Belgians who have won the Abel Prize. Since each row represents a laureate and the "citizenship" column indicates their nationality, we need to group by the "citizenship" column to count Belgian laureates. We can use the f_group_column(citizenship) operation to group the laureates based on their citizenship to analyze this situation.

Explanation: The first row shows two laureates: John G. Thompson (American) and Jacques Tits (Belgian/French). The second row shows Pierre Deligne as Belgian. Since Jacques Tits has Belgian/French citizenship (counting as Belgian), and Pierre Deligne is fully Belgian, this means 2 Belgians have won the Abel Prize.
